subject: Errata of GRB name in GCN 15196: should have been GRB 130907A instead of GRB 120916A
body:
We made an error in the Subject of GCN 15196.

It should have been :

"GRB 130907A: Fermi-LAT detection of a burst"

instead of:

"GRB 120916A: Fermi-LAT detection of a burst"

We apologize for this error and for the confusion this might have caused.
